gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking the health and metrics of all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot is holding a clipboard or scanning plants (representing apps), while Polly waters them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny clipboard, checking the plants' health. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
